problem id: 91c9c95f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(2)) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11010110 -> 00001011
  00100010 -> 00000000
  11011001 -> 00100011
  00010110 -> 00001000
  00110010 -> 01000000
  01110101 -> 11000001
  10011000 -> 00100010

query: 10101100
predicted answer: 00010010
